name: Completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry has no posted results
summary: A completed TA-65 metabolic registry remains a watchlist item because registry results are not posted.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT02531334 as a completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry with estimated enrollment of 40 and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults aged 32 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome
time_horizon: Actual completion listed in June 2018; no posted results as of the June 10, 2026 API view
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment was 40; primary outcome was plasma insulin.
caveats: Completed registry status does not imply that outcome data are available.
No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The metabolic-syndrome scope is disease-context evidence, not broad aging evidence.
